title: Supreme Technology
description: Build automatic farms, explore vast and breath-taking biomes, loose your mind to magic, kill formidable bosses or just build a simple ranch with a cheese production line! Just always remember to be creative and to have fun!
body:
Hello! This modpack was made by me, in order to not get bored in Minecraft anymore, it has all the main technology mods, and some less popular too!

Explore a vast and diverse world, with Terralith, The Biomes we've gone, Dungeons and Taverns, Alex's Caves and MORE!

Have magic powers with Hexcasting and Roundabout!

Automate any resource you may need with Create, Mekanism and AE2!

This modpack have plenty options of optimization and quality of life, feel free to customize to your specs!

And, after all, have FUN!
